title: Add tracker-edit tasks
summary: Extend the task workflow so tracker edits can be represented as auditable tracker-maintenance tasks created through the canonical initiate-task surface.
acceptance_criteria: task JSON and task index summaries support task_kind
target:tracker is documented as the route for tracker-maintenance tasks
tracker-maintenance tasks must link tracker files they expect to edit
query output shows task_kind for task lists and snapshots
validation fails tracker-maintenance tasks without tracker linked artifacts

context_snapshot.summary: Load workflow-foundry project state, both open tasks, and the task workflow surfaces before continuing tracker-edit task support.

session_log.event: Created tracker-maintenance task to audit implementation of target:tracker task support.
